violations.text: Handwashing signage is lacking at hand sink in back storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (back storage) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025
The (ceilings ) in the (back storage ) area is in poor repair. Observed missing tiles.The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025
